headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 gap up and gap down stocks

headline: Shares of machinery-related industrial companies are trading higher amid broader market gains following the reopening of the Straight of Hormuz, aided by lower energy and commodity prices and expectations for increased demand.
summary: Shares of machinery-related industrial companies are trading higher amid broader market gains following the reopening of the Straight of Hormuz, aided by lower energy and commodity prices and expectations for increased demand.
